title: Writing to one structure element clobbers another

features.name: nonblocking assignment with shift index exceeding 32 bits
features.description: Code should include a nonblocking assignment to an unpacked array element where the bit-select index is computed via a right shift operation that can produce a value exceeding 31 bits

features.name: bit select assignment with large shift index
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of multi-bit elements where a bit select assignment uses a computed index that exceeds the bit width of the shifted value
